title: • The Eclipse → Everyone loses one item for the week.
content:
• The Eclipse → Everyone loses one item for the week.
• Divine Intervention → A faction receives an unexpected gift.
• The Tides of War → Two factions must form an uneasy alliance.
• The Prophecy Fulfilled → A random player’s secret fate is revealed.
• The Trial of the Gods → A single player is called forth to face a challenge.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Ensures variety in weekly gameplay.
✔ Adds an element of literary fate & prophecy.
✔ Keeps students engaged & excited for unexpected twists.

📜 4. Tarot & Astrology – Weekly Symbolism Tied to the Narrative

📜 Every week will have a tarot card and astrological sign tied to the class theme.

✔ How It Works:
• Each week, a Tarot card is drawn that sets a thematic element.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 511 (chunk 511/555)
